channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Governor Dapo Abiodun’s Road Projects and Ogun State’s Infrastructure Transformation
item.description: Ogun State Governor Dapo Abiodun has made road infrastructure a central pillar of his administration since 2019, as part of a broader plan to transform the state’s economy and connectivity. The piece ...

item.title: APC Convention to Present Tinubu’s Performance and Environmental Agenda
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don release their plan for the National Convention wey dem wan hold this weekend. According to the party, the main aim na to review the work President Bola Tinubu d...

item.title: China’s Zero-Tariff Plan Opens New Trade Doors for African Economies
item.description: China’s decision to open its market to 53 African countries with zero tariffs beginning May 2026 marks a major shift in China-Africa trade relations. During his official visit to Kenya, China’s Vice P...

item.title: Trump halts US strikes as Iran signals willingness for negotiations
item.description: The latest escalation in the Middle East has seen tensions rise between Israel, Lebanon, and Iran-backed Hezbollah. Israel has intensified air and ground strikes in southern Lebanon, targeting bridges...

item.title: Stella Faces Heart-Wrenching Separation in The Alibi Episode 6
item.description: The sixth episode of ABS-CBN’s drama series The Alibi takes viewers on an emotional journey through Stella Morales’ (played by Kim Chiu) painful separation from the people closest to her—Joseph, Kathe...

item.title: Indian stock market sees sharp decline, investors lose Rs 12 lakh crore in a short period
item.description: Indian stock markets witnessed a dramatic fall, wiping out over Rs 12 lakh crore in market value within an hour. This sharp downturn raised several concerns among investors and market analysts. The su...

item.title: The best cordless vacuum cleaners of 2026 for every type of floor and pet owner
item.description: In 2026, cordless vacuums have evolved into powerful, high-tech cleaning tools that cater to different flooring types and household needs. Leading manufacturers such as Dyson, SharkNinja, Tineco, Biss...

item.title: Trump Orders Temporary Halt on Strikes Against Iranian Energy Infrastructure Following Talks
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced a five-day pause on military strikes targeting Iranian energy infrastructure after holding discussions with Tehran that he described as 'in depth, detailed, and c...

item.title: Oyo State Government Approves ₦10,000 Monthly Top-Up for Workers Amid Fuel Price Hike
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, don announce say all workers wey dey work under Oyo State government go dey get extra ₦10,000 per month to help dem cope with the wahala wey rising fuel price dey cau...

item.title: Kenya's Rising Domestic Debt: Costs, Risks, and Impact on Economy
item.description: Kenya's increasing reliance on domestic borrowing is raising concerns about its impact on the economy. According to the Institute of Public Finance (IPF), domestic debt now forms the largest portion o...

item.title: Transport Minister urges proper use of weather information to protect lives and property
item.description: Dar es Salaam – On the occasion of World Meteorological Day, Transport Minister Makame Mbarawa has urged all stakeholders in the transport and related sectors to properly use and rely on accurate weat...

item.title: 19-year-old arrested in Calgary over Toronto and Vaughan homicide cases
item.description: A 19-year-old man from Edmonton, identified as Isaiah Thomas Badger, has been arrested in Calgary in connection with two separate homicide investigations in Ontario. Toronto and York Regional Police c...

item.title: How American Fast-Food Trends Are Shaping Manchester’s Culinary Scene
item.description: Manchester is experiencing a surge in American-inspired fast food, with businesses like Fat Pat’s, Bada Bing, Brodega, and McKeown’s Slices bringing hyper-regional US sandwiches and pizzas to the city...

item.title: Two pilots killed and dozens injured after Air Canada plane collides with fire truck at LaGuardia Airport
item.description: An Air Canada Express flight operated by Jazz Aviation collided with a fire truck on the runway at New York’s LaGuardia Airport on Sunday night after arriving from Montreal with 76 passengers on board...

item.title: Police investigate threat leading to evacuation of North York high school
item.description: Toronto police say a North York high school was evacuated Monday morning after a threat was reported, prompting an immediate response from law enforcement and school officials. The incident occurred o...

item.title: Adivasi and Dalit groups support UDF while protesting exclusion from candidate lists in Kerala 2026 polls
item.description: In the run-up to the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections, several Dalit and Adivasi organisations, including the Adivasi Gothra Mahasabha (AGMS) and the Ambedkarite Democratic Front (ADF), have declared th...

item.title: Seven New Commissioners Join Kenya's National Land Commission
item.description: On Monday, Kenya took a significant step in enhancing land governance as seven new commissioners were sworn into the National Land Commission (NLC) in Nairobi. The event, presided over by Chief Justic...

item.title: Kaduna State Expands Water Infrastructure to Improve Access Across Communities
item.description: The Kaduna State Government don talk say the reforms wey dem dey do for the water sector don begin show results as more people for the state dey get better access to clean water. The Commissioner for ...

item.title: Three African nations explore debt-for-nature deals to fund environmental conservation
item.description: The Nature Conservancy (TNC), a US-based environmental organisation, is in talks with three African countries to arrange debt-for-nature swaps worth around $500 million (R8.4bn) collectively. These ar...

item.title: US Hosts DRC and Rwanda Officials to Discuss Eastern Congo Peace and Energy Cooperation
item.description: This week, the US government is focusing on both peace and energy in Africa. Officials from the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) and Rwanda are expected in Washington for talks about ongoing violenc...
